summary: Applied ADR 0318 from the dedicated `ws-0318` worktree by making the direct onboarding fallback safe from linked git worktrees, aligning its role and group contract with `scripts/operator_manager.py`, adding ephemeral Keycloak and SMTP runtime secret overrides for recovery, and fully provisioning the temporary admin operator `florin-tmp-002` through the documented `docker-runtime-lv3` fallback lane while the public Keycloak edge still returned `502`.

verification.observed: `python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_provision_operator.py`, `python3 -m py_compile scripts/provision_operator.py`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, and `uv run --with jsonschema python3 scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate` all passed after the worktree-local path resolution, runtime secret override, ADR metadata, and roster updates, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-pytest-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-py-compile-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-agent-standards-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-workstream-surfaces-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-data-models-r1.txt`.

`python3 scripts/operator_manager.py validate` accepted the new `config/operators.yaml` record for `florin-tmp-002`, including the current admin bootstrap SSH placeholder required by the repo contract, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-operator-manager-validate-r1.txt`.

The final replay used `LV3_KEYCLOAK_URL=http://127.0.0.1:28080` plus ephemeral `LV3_KEYCLOAK_BOOTSTRAP_PASSWORD` and `LV3_PLATFORM_SMTP_PASSWORD` overrides sourced from `docker-runtime-lv3`, reused the previously generated Keycloak password and Headscale authkey files, reverified Keycloak user `d1c1c5b5-f4c8-47de-8865-c529789ada77` with realm role `platform-admin` and groups `lv3-platform-admins` / `grafana-admins`, and successfully sent the requester-CC onboarding email to `baditaflorin+tmp002@gmail.com` and `baditaflorin@gmail.com`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-provision-operator-r7.txt`.

verification.check: Fallback lane discovery and drift diagnosis
verification.observed: The workstream preserved the real control-plane drift that made the fallback necessary: the public `sso.lv3.org` edge returned `502`, `runtime-control-lv3` OpenBao still reported `initialized:false`, and the healthy Keycloak plus mail secret path remained on `docker-runtime-lv3`; the prechecks and converge probes are preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-keycloak-precheck-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-keycloak-converge-r1.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-openbao-precheck-r1.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-openbao-converge-r1.txt`.

`make preflight WORKFLOW=operator-onboard` still fails on live platform-health checks outside this ADR-local fallback path because public Keycloak discovery returns `502` and the private Windmill API at `http://100.64.0.1:8005/api/version` resets the connection, even though the local secret-file prerequisites and OpenBao mTLS listener check passed; this remains preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-04-03-ws-0318-preflight-r1.txt`.

notes: This receipt intentionally captures the dedicated-worktree live apply before the exact-main release surfaces, repo-version stamp, and canonical mainline receipt are generated.

The earlier failed replays remain in evidence on purpose because they exposed real branch-local drift: a worktree-shadow `.local` directory, a stale controller-local Keycloak bootstrap password, and a stale controller-local transactional SMTP password.

The workstream did not try to repair the separate runtime-control migration drift after proving that the documented ADR 0317 fallback lane on `docker-runtime-lv3` was still the only healthy path for completing ADR 0318.

correction_loop.repair_action: Taught the fallback script to resolve shared `.local/` state from linked worktrees, derive canonical Keycloak role and group mappings from `operator_manager.py`, and accept ephemeral live Keycloak and SMTP secret overrides; then aligned the new admin roster entry with the repo's current bootstrap SSH placeholder contract so `operator_manager.py validate` remained green.
